canonical_definition: A multilingual benchmark comprising 2,500 synthetic resumes across 50 templates and 5 languages, designed to evaluate LLMs on structured resume parsing with realism and privacy compliance.
papers: Can Large Language Models Outperform Non-Experts in Poetry Evaluation? A Comparative Study Using the Consensual Assessment Technique

definitions.paper: Can Large Language Models Outperform Non-Experts in Poetry Evaluation? A Comparative Study Using the Consensual Assessment Technique
